currentProviderGaps.create_with_distributions: writes the external API but does not persist project or distribution identifiers in the local ledger
currentProviderGaps.sync_mcn_inquiry_status: records sync metadata only; it does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
currentProviderGaps.rank_mcns: the production Provider has not been verified to bind inquiry_id to the actual selected supplier set and return its (platform, kwUid)-deduplicated coverage union
currentProviderGaps.manual_source_creators: the live input accepts requirement_id and size, but the current host omits session context from before_tool_call; the plugin therefore returns INTEGRATION_REQUIRED instead of authorizing from global state until the host is upgraded
currentProviderGaps.create_submission_batch: the requirement_id, size, number target input is approved locally but not yet deployed on the production Provider
currentProviderGaps.maximumRecoverablePhase: recommendation_ready until the target create_submission_batch input is deployed

policies.humanInTheLoop: native AskUserQuestion is the only conversational input surface; plain-text questions and next-step menus never form a workflow gate, while a purpose-built Tool callback remains Tool-owned interaction
policies.deterministicContinuation: when next_action is determined and no AskUserQuestion gate, provider wait, terminal state, or fail-closed stop applies, execute it in the same assistant turn without requesting continue; a submitted Ask answer is an executable command, not an acknowledgement step
policies.multiPlatformContinuation: split every explicit platform into an independent requirement in first-appearance order, collect unresolved values once, retain one exact originalBrief, and never ask which platform to process first or whether to continue the remaining platform
policies.evidenceConflict: when local required evidence marks a Tool result failed or invalid, do not report business success or offer unsupported downstream actions merely because the response contains generic success wording
policies.outwardSendConfirmation: first create_with_distributions invocation is blocked locally with exact AskUserQuestion arguments; only a confirmed answer authorizes one subsequent invocation with the same parameter fingerprint
policies.fieldSelectionBinding: the submitted selector description becomes the ordered columns passed to rank_creators in the same direct flow
policies.stateRefresh: read local JSON on every prompt; use get_workflow_state only for context loss or unknown write reconciliation
policies.unknownWriteRecovery: current provider: get_workflow_state by demand identity from existing business facts; ledger trace_id reconciliation is target-only and an unknown external create remains blocked; never blind retry
policies.postValidationContinuation: a successful validate_requirement result immediately continues to manual_source_creators when the current user intent is manual sourcing, including a concise continuation reply to an assistant offer to start manual sourcing; otherwise it continues to search_creators in the same turn
policies.postSearchContinuation: before MCN racing, require total_matched plus supply_assessment, record the consumed response contract, and render only the deduplicated eligible rate-card creator count, its multiplier against demand, and the approved <20 / 20-<30 / >=30 risk advice; legacy demand_count/eligible_creator_count/supply_ratio-only responses are invalid evidence
policies.mcnRace: after the media operator selects actual inquiry suppliers, rank_mcns persists the inquiry association and returns that exact supplier set plus its (platform, kwUid)-deduplicated coverage union; never hardcode five recommendations or display IDs
policies.directFlowEntry: manual sourcing may be initiated from any existing phase; field selection is required only for the export continuation and, when needed, completes before the fresh requirement validation
policies.manualSourcingPlacement: from any existing phase, run validate_requirement for this call and make manual_source_creators the next business Tool with exactly its newly returned 32-character data.id and a positive integer decimal string size; do not require historical search or another workflow completion
policies.manualRequirementIdentity: one successful validate_requirement response binds its fresh 32-character data.id to exactly one immediately following same-session manual_source_creators call; numeric data.demand_id and demand_version are never Tool IDs, a local format correction reuses the existing validation response, and missing before_tool session context stops with INTEGRATION_REQUIRED without revalidation
policies.searchRequirementIdentity: search_creators.id is the 32-character data.id from the latest successful validation; numeric data.demand_id and demand_version are rejected locally and corrected from the existing response without creating another demand
policies.briefIntegrity: validate_requirement rawMessagesJson.originalBrief equals an exact real client Brief recovered from the current conversation after host-envelope stripping; AskUserQuestion and Tool JSON do not replace it, retry markers and platform-specific reconstructions are rejected, and independently validated platform payloads retain the same complete multi-platform originalBrief
policies.selectedSupplierBinding: create_with_distributions supplierIds must equal the supplier set bound to the latest selected-supplier coverage calculation; any set change requires recalculation
policies.manualSourcingEvidence: advance only when the successful manual_source_creators response supplies actual non-empty inquiry_ids for the current requirement and size
policies.rankCreatorsPrerequisite: manual_source_creators succeeded and rank_creators receives those exact inquiry_ids plus the current requirement and selected columns
policies.submissionExport: after rank_creators succeeds, immediately call create_submission_batch with the same requirement_id and size plus the confirmed positive batch number

guards: payload matches live schema
id is the 32-character data.id from the latest same-session successful validation when host context is available
numeric data.demand_id and demand_version are rejected before Provider execution
candidate pool belongs to the same requirement
pre-race confirmation contains no exact manual target
minimum_mcn_count is derived dynamically instead of fixed at five
write_mcn_recommendation_items is not false so the inquiry association is persisted
evidence: a non-empty inquiry_id created for the same requirement
actual selected supplier IDs and their deduplicated coverage union with a formula-consistent risk decision

guards: platform is confirmed
the web selector returns an actual submitted field description
evidence: successful field-selection response recorded in local JSON

guards: supply, MCN, and field choices are present in local orchestration state
the exact multiline AskUserQuestion prompt and subsequent create_with_distributions parameters match the one-time confirmation receipt
requirement_id, supplierIds, columns, a plain-text WeChat-message description, and an identical wechat_notification_message resolve one requirement
evidence: actual successful external distribution response recorded in local JSON

guards: real project and distribution identifiers resolve to the same requirement and supplier
transitions.blockedBy: current sync Tool is metadata-only and does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
evidence: target-only: authoritative provider distribution mirrored to mcn_inquiries; current provider does not produce this evidence

guards: the immediately preceding successful validate_requirement returned this fresh 32-character data.id
the one-time same-session fresh requirement receipt is consumed by this call
missing before_tool session context returns INTEGRATION_REQUIRED without revalidation
size is a positive integer decimal string
no phase, historical search, or other workflow-completion gate is applied
evidence: successful manual response with actual non-empty inquiry_ids

guards: inquiry identity and ownership resolve uniquely
evidence: committed valid mcn_submission_items and updated inquiry

guards: committed WeCom distribution exists
all active platform inquiries are recovered or closed
inquiry_ids exactly match the successful manual response
requirement_id and selected columns match the current direct flow
evidence: successful filtered and deduplicated persisted ranking result

guards: requirement_id and size match the direct manual call
number is the confirmed positive integer decimal batch number
evidence: committed submission batch and exported spreadsheet

guards: run identity matches authoritative state
